calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Continued To Nov-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-22-2015 Continued To Oct-20-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jon Vaught for (petitioner) Leamond McGriff III.

The Court stated that the objections of Glenda McGriff have been overruled and that the court needs additional time to review the documents filed yesterday. Mr. Vaught stated that the original attorney (Ms. Billingsley) will not speak to him, that she is requesting 1/3 of the estate but will not provide time records, that they need to re-notice, that the court can strike the fee request and approve the rest of the petition if it wants and clarified that they needed to file and amended petition as opposed to an amendment to the petition. The accounting petition was continued to October 20, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-08-2015 Continued To Sep-22-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jon Vaught for and with Leamond McGriff.

Mr. Vaught stated that he just substituted in this morning. The Court informed Counsel that it will not admit this lost will and that it was going to continue the matter for filing of an amended petition. At the conclusion of the hearing Mr. Vaught informed the Court that he found the original will in the file that was turned over by the Former Attorney. Mr. Vaught was directed to file the original will. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Continued To Mar-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
